mcp-toolbox-sdk-java._note: JSON has no variable interpolation. Set the JAR path in your IDE MCP config or WORKSTATION_LOCAL_OVERRIDES. Run scripts/build_java_mcp.sh to get the absolute path.

mcp-toolbox-for-databases._note: Package name is placeholder. Replace with the actual published MCP database toolbox package from googleapis/genai-toolbox or build from source.

github-mcp._note: GitHub MCP uses the CLI-based server via npx, not a REST endpoint. OAuth DCR is not yet supported for MCP servers. Use a PAT or GitHub App installation token.
